text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross is doing some warm-ups before
training when...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
That's strange... My legs aren't movin' how I want
'em to...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I can't be stumblin' over somethin' this small.
Everyone else is workin' just as hard as I am.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta win me a ton of races, get nice 'n
famous, and set the fam up so they can live easy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the race fatigue is getting to her... Looks
like I need to rethink her upcoming race schedule.
